changelog:
* **feat: add raw GitHub CDN OTA update checking system** (d0b4112)
  - Use raw.githubusercontent.com version.json for instant, un-rate-limited update checks
  - Remove 4-hour caching interval so updates trigger immediately on launch
  - Trigger version check early in MainActivity onCreate
  - Add bot.py ota subcommand to generate version.json automatically
  - Update build_apk.yml workflow to auto-commit version.json on release
